productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Lavender And Grey Check Shirt
description: Style Note Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  Product Details Multicoloured patterned shirt, has a slim spread collar, full buttoned placket, buttoned tabs on the shoulder, back yoke, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two mid arm buttoned tabs to adjust the length of the sleeve when folding it up, patch pocket on the left with branding above it and curved hemline with branding above the hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M Style NoteProudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
